question: What are the dates and ids of the invoices that are related to at least 2 shipments?
sql: SELECT invoice_number, invoice_date FROM Invoices WHERE invoice_number IN (SELECT invoice_number FROM Shipments GROUP BY invoice_number HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) ORDER BY invoice_date;

back_translation.intent: 查找在Shipments中出现至少两次的发票号码，并获取它们的发票日期
filters: invoice_number IN (SELECT invoice_number FROM Shipments GROUP BY invoice_number HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取与至少2个shipments相关的invoices的日期和id，SQL描述通过子查询筛选出Shipments中出现次数≥2的invoice_number，并从Invoices表中获取对应日期和编号，完全匹配问题意图。
